game_name: Chester Cheetah: Too Cool to Fool

design_philosophy.core_loop: Traverse side-scrolling platform levels while collecting hidden scooter parts and defeating enemies through jumping mechanics
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Exploration of hidden collectibles balanced against platforming hazards and enemy encounters
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Play as the cool Chester Cheetah mascot navigating themed environments while gathering components
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Licensed IP platformer designed as a straightforward, accessible experience tied to Cheetos brand marketing rather than pushing platformer genre boundaries

difficulty.lives_system: Standard platformer lives system inferred from genre conventions of era

progression.upgrade_system: Collection of hidden scooter parts as progression mechanic
progression.unlock_mechanism: Completion of sequential side-scrolling levels unlocks subsequent stages
replayability_hooks: Hidden scooter parts encourage level re-exploration
Collectible-based progression may incentivize speedrunning or completionist approaches

world_building_techniques: Themed level design tied to Chester Cheetah brand identity
Character appearance as recognizable Cheetos mascot grounds narrative in commercial universe

danger_signals: Licensed platformer designed primarily as marketing vehicle rather than substantive game experience
environmental_storytelling: Levels presumably themed around Cheetos brand aesthetic and Chester's cool persona

sources_used: Wikipedia - Chester Cheetah article (Video games section)
